title: Add Oráculo de la Era Salvaje · IA Bestias y Monstruos to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Beasts, Bosses, and Bees
gist.blurb: The community just dropped 'Oráculo de la Era Salvaje' into the greenhouse. It's an AI oracle for the Roblox game Bestias y Monstruos, ready to dispense lore and boss strategies.
gist.summary: Added 'Oráculo de la Era Salvaje', a community-built AI companion for the Roblox game Bestias y Monstruos, to the app showcase.
gist.impact: Roblox players can now consult a dedicated AI oracle for game lore and boss strategies, powered by our text API.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a Roblox game companion app called 'Oracle of the Wild Era' focusing on beasts and monsters. Polly the bee interacting with a glowing oracle crystal or a friendly mythical beast in a wild, lush setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, consulting a glowing magical crystal ball resting on a mossy stone. A friendly, chunky pixel-art mythical beast peeks out from lush green foliage in the background. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
